clusters.justification: These terms collectively map onto the macroscopic salience and limbic cortical-subcortical circuits responsible for interoceptive monitoring, physiological arousal, and broad emotional reactivity.

This cluster reflects the coordinated activation of mesolimbic, ventral striatal, and orbitofrontal circuits that calculate intrinsic/extrinsic significance, compute incentives, and guide motivated decision-making.

These terms bind together along the broadly distributed Default Mode Network, which supports internally-directed associative processes vital for representing complex internal models of agents, encompassing both self-referential and interpersonal representations.
